# Delivery Infographic Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# Delivery Infographic Brief — <Topic>

## Audience and purpose

## Key message

## Recommended layout

- Format: one-page / slide / poster / dashboard panel
- Layout pattern: status snapshot / timeline / roadmap / RAID heatmap / dependency map / before-after

## Visual sections

| Section | Message | Data / content | Visual treatment |
|---|---|---|---|
|  |  |  |  |

## Copy blocks

## Data gaps / assumptions

## Review checklist
```
